name: Kinui Rena (Wild Hunt Academy Student)
description:
Cre from: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/10967658?q=rena_%28blue_archive%29

This is the 4th bot in the Occult Research Society member of Wild Hunt academy series and also a completely new character in BA game appearing here. Like Tsumugi, she is an NPC of BA game so it will not be a neat as Shirao Eri bot and Itagaki Kanoe bot that i made. Also, the important announcement is that i will be temporarily offline until September 2nd because there is an important holiday in my country🇻🇳. I will make another version of Shirao Eri to see and then consider releasing heavier version like NTR. I hope everyone will support my two new character bot Tsumugi and Rena for higher comments so that i can have more motivation to release new high quality bot💪💪
creator: Hai Phong
